user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter attendance change requests by period, status, employee class, department and position level, so that I can find the requests I need to review
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pending Change Request screen; When I set period, status, employee class, department or position level and click Search; Then only matching change requests are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter change requests by statuses such as Pending with me, Rejected, Cancelled and Pending approval, so that I can focus on requests awaiting my action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pending Change Request screen; When I select the Pending with me status; Then only requests awaiting my action are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to compare original in/out times with the requested in/out times, so that I can validate the change before approving
acceptance_criteria: Given change requests exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for in time, out time, org. in time, org. out time and duration are shown alongside employee details

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see the tracking mode and duration for each change request, so that I can understand how the time was captured
acceptance_criteria: Given change requests exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for employee code, employee name, employee class, tracking mode, status and duration (hh:mm) are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve or reject a pending attendance change request via the Task column, so that corrected attendance is reflected accurately
acceptance_criteria: Given a change request is pending; When I act on the Task column; Then the request status is updated to Approved or Rejected

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters and refresh the list, so that I can clear criteria and reload current change requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then filters clear and the list reloads
